identity.linkedin_headline: Medical Doctor/GP Partner | Med Tech Founder

companies.name: Lookhealth.co
companies.description: Preventative health platform with blockchain pivot. Unable to gain funding but built pitching skills.

medical_career.qualification: MBBS from The Royal Free and UCL Medical School (1999-2005)

education.institution: The Royal Free and UCL Medical School

education.dissertation: The Management of Hyperpigmentation in Skin of Colour

entrepreneurial_history.description: World's leading Deep Tech accelerator. Accepted as 1 of 75 from 3,000 applicants worldwide.
entrepreneurial_history.focus: Medical projects in data science, AR/VR, ML, computer vision, AI

entrepreneurial_history.description: Inaugural board member. GP federation covering 100,000 patients in North Central London. Bid writing, service provision decisions.

communication_preferences.tone: Professional but warm. Peer-to-peer, not sales.
communication_preferences.technical_level: Non-technical on code. Strong on digital marketing, business strategy, AI concepts.
communication_preferences.analogies: Healthcare/wellness analogies work well (diagnosis, treatment plan, outcome)
communication_preferences.respect_points: 21 years NHS, EF8 alumni, MSc Distinction, 3 startups, public speaker to 200+ audiences

project.name: Autonomous Marketing Agent for Digital Health Products
project.problem_statement: The hard thing is not building the digital product but assisting in the marketing of the product
project.desired_outcome: Automated organic marketing across Pinterest, YouTube, Meta, Twitter for digital health/skincare products
project.vision: Stan.store + Blaze.ai combined, but with autonomous agents
project.franchise_potential: High. EF8 alumni, digital marketing trained, serial founder. Could offer AI marketing agents to other health professionals.

conversation_log.summary: Initial outreach. Research initiative on AI tools for medical professionals. Offered 15-min demo of Claude Code CLI and OpenCode CLI.
Responded positively. Interested in autonomous agents in healthcare. 7 years in AI+healthcare. Started own health tech company. GP Lead. Wants to found a new company. Asked to talk.
Asked for email to send Google Meet invite. Shared lee@navada.info
Sent email demo (agent-generated). Provided context: teaching Black professionals to code (18 women), wants to work with someone in medical field. Shared phone number 07935237704.
Good phone conversation. She shared Vallour Healthcare Services website. Lee shared WorldMonitor link and Medwise.ai Instagram post.
Morning follow-up. Great conversation reference. Offered to add her to WhatsApp group with the ladies. Offered to start research.
Asked to be added to WhatsApp group. Said she would put together a document in a few hours.

Shared her ideas: (1) Quick ROI: better version of Stan.store for building/selling digital products. (2) Key pain point: marketing is harder than building. (3) Wants automated organic marketing across Pinterest/YouTube/Meta/Twitter. (4) Referenced blaze.ai as inspiration.

next_actions: Lee to review and approve proposal email
Lee to instruct when to send proposal to Dr Maureen
Schedule demo call after proposal sent
Build agent specification based on tier choice
